transcript: Speaker A: सच बताऊं तो मैं, मुझे कॉल ज्वाइन करते समय बहुत ऑकवर्ड लग रहा था। [To be honest, I was feeling very awkward while joining the call.] Speaker B: सेम, मुझे लगा सामने वाला जज करेगा। [Same, I thought the other person would judge.] Speaker A: लेकिन यहां सभी सीखने ही आए हैं ना। [But everyone has come here to learn, right?] Speaker B: हां, इसलिए धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंस आता है। [Yes, that's why confidence comes slowly.] Speaker A: नाइस, फिर रोज प्रैक्टिस करते हो? [Nice, so do you practice daily?] Speaker B: हां, I practice daily at least for 15 to 20 minutes. [Yes, I practice daily at least for 15 to 20 minutes.] Speaker A: अरे वाह! मस्त इंग्लिश बोलने लगे हो। [Oh wow! You've started speaking great English.] Speaker C: MySivi ऐप पर 1 करोड़ लोग एक दूसरे से बात करके स्पोकन इंग्लिश की प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। आप भी आज ही शुरू करें। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में। [On the MySivi app, 1 crore people are practicing spoken English by talking to each other. You should also start today. Trial for just ₹1.] Speaker D: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani. Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi AI English Speaking App. Master Spoken Eng. Sharpen your English with 1-on-1 calls. Try MySivi today! MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access. MySivi English speaking app. Install Now.
summary: The ad features a simulated conversation between two users on the MySivi app, discussing how they overcame their initial awkwardness and fear of judgment through daily practice. The voiceover highlights that over 10 million users practice English on the platform and promotes a trial offer for just ₹1. The call to action urges viewers to install the app.
